title: About the Survey of Business Operations 2026 | Stats NZ
content:
## About the Survey of Business Operations 2026
17 April 2026, 2:00pm
The Survey of Business Operations is a new national survey being jointly delivered by Stats NZ and the Ministry of Business, Innovation and Employment (MBIE).
The survey is being carried out by Ipsos Limited, an independent research company, on behalf of MBIE and Stats NZ.
The survey builds on the long-running Business Operations Survey and helps provide a comprehensive picture of how New Zealand businesses operate, innovate and grow.
Please visit MBIE’s website for more information and help with filling out the survey:
Survey of Business Operations 2026 | Ministry of Business, Innovation & Employment .
If you have questions or require assistance, please contact Ipsos:
Email: NZ-Field-Help@ipsos.com Freephone: 0800 478 783

## How Stats NZ uses contact information
Stats NZ keeps business contact information (such as a name, email address, or phone number) to help carry out its surveys and research. Contact details may come from information provided on returned survey forms, from direct contact with businesses as part of follow up calls or other operational interactions, and from publicly available sources such as company websites.
Stats NZ collects and uses business contact information under the authority of the Data and Statistics Act 2022 for approved statistical and research purposes.
This information may be shared with trusted third party providers who help deliver surveys or research. In some cases, contact details may be shared with trusted third party providers, such as MBIE, where the outcome of the work is for that provider rather than for Stats NZ. These providers are required to protect the information and may use it only for approved statistical or research purposes, in accordance with legal, contractual, and confidentiality requirements.
Contact details are used only for approved statistical or research purposes and managed carefully to maintain our high standards of privacy, security and confidentiality. All personal information collected for business surveys is subject to strict confidentiality obligations under the Data and Statistics Act 2022.
Stats NZ keeps contact information only for as long as it is needed to carry out approved statistical or research purposes and then disposes of it securely in accordance with legal and information management requirements.
Providing contact information helps Stats NZ to administer surveys and carry out follow up where required. There are no legal penalties for not providing contact details; however, it may limit our ability to contact you about a survey.
Individuals have the right to access and request correction of their personal information held by Stats NZ.

## Privacy statement for stats.govt.nz | Stats NZ
Find out about the information we collect about visits to our website: Privacy statement .
- About the Business Operations Survey 17 April 2026
